long_description:
[COM] Master node count below threshold is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_node_count_below_threshold.html
TIP Situation: Master node count below threshold 
TIP Short Description: Masternode count in mzone757-zonelet01 is below threshold 
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone757-zonelet01:node:N/A

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    (sum by (kube_cluster_name)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="true", kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_master="true"}) <5) OR (absent(kube_node_status_condition{ kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_master="true"})) = 4
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone757-zonelet01'

Time:             12/06/2025 05:39 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43996448%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] Master node count below threshold
Description:  Master node count reached below the threshold
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere

Duration: 1 h
